cnf(u28,axiom,

cnf(u17,axiom,
    ~cleanly(X0) | notably_tidy(X0)).

    ~notably_tidy(X0) | ~spill_lots(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.

for all inputs,
    define goes_out_frequently(X0) := $false
for all inputs,

for all inputs,
    define family_prioritizes_order_spotlessness(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
